summary: First-pass smoke testing of Karan Pande photography portfolio. Backend health, public media endpoints, admin auth + full CRUD verified via curl. Frontend home/hero/CTAs, wedding + pre-wedding galleries with lightbox, cinematic play + video lightbox, contact links, admin guard, login (wrong+valid), dashboard tabs, create/delete via modal, and logout all pass.
passed: POST /api/admin/login: wrong creds -> 401; correct creds -> JWT token (field name is 'token', not 'access_token')
POST /api/admin/media without auth -> 401; with Bearer -> creates item
DELETE /api/admin/media/{id} removes item; subsequent GET no longer returns it
Home: hero-video, hero-cta-work, hero-cta-contact, cat-wedding/prewedding/cinematic all present; CTA navigates to /wedding
Wedding gallery: heading present, 6 images, lightbox opens on image click, next-chapter navigates to /pre-wedding
Cinematic: 3 cine-play buttons; lightbox-video renders on click
Contact: contact-phone (tel:), contact-whatsapp (wa.me), contact-email (mailto:), contact-instagram (instagram.com) all correct hrefs
Admin guard: /admin without token redirects to /admin/login
Admin login: wrong creds stay on /admin/login; valid creds go to /admin
Admin dashboard: tab-wedding, tab-pre-wedding, tab-cinematic present; add-media-btn opens media-modal; new item created appears in grid; delete removes it; admin-logout returns to /admin/login
notes: Backend login response uses key 'token' (not 'access_token'). Frontend api client already handles this correctly. No blockers observed.
